comments: Approved. Git show for commit 16bd84c matches the execution result artifact: the only implementation file created is tasks/v0.7-m3-a-feedback-taxonomy.md, and the only additional created artifacts are tasks/v0.7-m3-a-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.7-m3-a-result-review-packet.json. The markdown explicitly defines the failure taxonomy, passive feedback ingestion from physical artifacts, retrospective artifact mapping to carry_overs, and a strict 3-retry threshold separating normal retries from escalated improvement cases. No automation scripts, automatic retry implementation, governance/review rewrites, .agent-state migration, or active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json semantic modifications are present in the commit.
